SR1.landmarks_not_visible: I can't see you! Try to position yourself in the center of the screen or move to a better lit area.
SR1.facing_wrong_direction: You're facing the wrong way! Turn your body either left or right of the camera.
SR1.not_in_starting_position: Start exercising for me to provide live feedback!

right_elbow.high_angle: Try to straighten your arm more! You may also be flexing your arm too much at the end.
right_elbow.low_angle: Try to bend your arm more! You may be straightening your arm too much when extending.

left_elbow.high_angle: Try to straighten your arm more! You may also be flexing your arm too much at the end.
left_elbow.low_angle: Try to bend your arm more! You may be straightening your arm too much when extending.
